content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Auto (+1.80%), Pharma (+1.29%), PSU Bank (+1.45%), Bank Nifty (+1.11%) leading; VIX cooling -3.6% to 17.26. Global cues supportive (US indices +0.7-1%). Book is heavily deployed (66%) with multiple winners; priority is trailing SLs on movers and managing binary-event exposure (HAL Q4 May 14, CHOLAHLDNG May 8 results in 2 sessions).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +7.1%, CMP 1058. Current SL 1040.66 is at +5.8% from entry — already locking solid gains. Loosening trail slightly to 1035 (just below today's S1 1035.43, ~2.2% below CMP) gives the breakout room to run toward target 1110. Wait — guardrail rejects loosening; current SL 1040.66 must only be tightened. Reverting: tighten to 1045 (just below pivot 1051.97 / S1 1035 zone is too wide for tightening). Actually keeping SL at 1040.66 — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction to prior block: SL 1040.66 already locks +5.8% gain, ~1.6% below CMP 1058 — within normal noise tolerance, not a self-stopout. Target 1110 intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive anchor, -1.0% within normal chop. SL 119 (~3.9% below CMP) appropriate. Gold modestly higher today, no thesis change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL already at 1715 (entry+0.9%, breakeven-plus). Replacing with HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock fading -0.58% today after ATH yesterday; SL 1715 already at breakeven+ (~1.1% below CMP 1732). Trail-gap discipline says don't tighten further (already <1.5% gap). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 206.00,
      "new_target": 222.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY — SL already 206. Replacing with HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry, banking sector strong, MACD bullish crossover, Q4 PAT +68% YoY thesis intact. SL 206 (~1.1% below CMP) tight but valid. Target 222."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BINARY EVENT WATCH: HAL Q4/FY26 results board meeting May 14 (~6 sessions away — outside the 3-session danger window for now, but approaching). Position +1.7%, SL at entry (breakeven). Trail-gap rule: SL 4575 vs CMP 4660 = 1.83% gap, acceptable. No-op MODIFY since SL=4575 already. Replace with HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defence momentum strong, +2.2% today, MACD bullish. SL 4575 at breakeven gives 1.83% trail gap. Will revisit ahead of May 14 Q4 board meeting (must trim/exit if held position +5% by ~May 12). Target 4875 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.8% on post-results fade (Q4 PAT +124%, FY26 +104%, net-debt negative — fundamentals strong, classic 'sell the news'). SL 1420 (~1.4% below CMP 1440) tight; thesis intact per Nuvama TP 1631. Hold to SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.2%, SL 6950 already above entry 6900 — locked breakeven+. Trail gap: 6950 vs CMP 7052 = 1.45% — acceptable. CDMO +61% YoY, Q4 PAT +124% YoY, MACD strong bullish. Target 7400 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat (-0.1%); intraday faded from 862 high to 837. BINARY EVENT WATCH: Q4 board meeting expected mid-late May (likely outside 3-session window currently). SL 820 (~2% below CMP) appropriate. Naval Falta + railway capex catalyst intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat (-0.4%); Q4 PAT +30% delivered, ABHFL Advent capital raise positive. SL 358 (~2.3% below CMP) reasonable. Hold to target 388."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "CHOLAHLDNG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 25,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BINARY-EVENT DISCIPLINE: CHOLAHLDNG FY26 audited results + earnings call scheduled May 8 — exactly 2 trading sessions away, well within 3-session danger window. Position is -0.3% (immaterial). Hard rule: 'default disposition is EXIT or risk-trim — NOT passive HOLD' for held positions with binary catalyst within 3 sessions. Position size ~4.3% capital is borderline, but holdco discount + earnings tail = asymmetric risk for marginal reward. Choosing option (a) full exit per rule 11. Realized P&L roughly flat — protecting against unknown print."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +18%, revenue +22% YoY delivered May 5; flat post-results. SL 800 (~2.3% below CMP) appropriate. FMCG sector +4.33% today, defensive bid intact. Target 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.5%, today +6.28% on Q4 PAT +48.5%, FY26 record. Auto sector leading (+1.80%). SL 3210 (~2.9% below CMP 3301) — trail gap healthy, room to run toward target 3430. Hold; will trail higher once +2-4% achieved."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1040.66, "reasoning": "SL already locks +5.8% gain; cannot loosen, tightening more would breach 1% trail gap."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 119.00, "reasoning": "Defensive anchor, normal chop."},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1715.00, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+; trail gap already at 1.1% — tightening further violates trail-gap discipline."},
    {"symbol": "BANDHANBNK", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 206.00, "reasoning": "Tight SL already in place at 1.1% below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 4575.00, "reasoning": "Breakeven SL; binary May 14 Q4 to manage in ~5 sessions."},
    {"symbol": "SOBHA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1420.00, "reasoning": "Post-results fade; SL at 1.4% below CMP, thesis strong."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 6950.00, "reasoning": "SL already above entry, 1.45% trail gap."},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 820.00, "reasoning": "2% trail; Q4 board meeting watch."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 358.00, "reasoning": "Q4 delivered, 2.3% trail."},
    {"symbol": "CHOLAHLDNG", "current_action": "EXIT", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "May 8 results 2 sessions away — binary-event rule mandates exit."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 800.00, "reasoning": "Post-results, 2.3% trail."},
    {"symbol": "M&M", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 3210.00, "reasoning": "Strong Q4 print, room to run to target."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Not adding new positions this tick: book is 66% deployed across 12 names, multiple positions already in winning sectors (Auto-M&M, Defence-HAL, Capital Goods-TITAGARH, Real Estate-SOBHA, Financial Services-ABCAPITAL/PNBHOUSING/CHOLAHLDNG-exiting). Adding more breakouts here would stack cluster correlation. HFCL pending BUY 133.50 LIMIT from earlier still OPEN — monitoring; if not filled by midday will cancel since price has likely moved. Watching COFORGE for IT-sector pullback entry, NEULANDLAB/AUROPHARMA on pharma momentum if a clean low-risk setup emerges later in week.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book heavily deployed (66%, ₹345k cash remaining). Day P&L +0.49% green. Key risk-management actions this tick: (1) EXIT CHOLAHLDNG ahead of May 8 binary results — discipline lesson from Day-10 BAJAJ-AUTO/EXIDEIND failure. (2) HAL May 14 Q4 calendar flagged for next-week trim/tighten. (3) Holding SL discipline on multiple positions with tight trail gaps already in place — avoiding micro-MODIFY churn that has hurt prior days. Cumulative experiment P&L just +₹6,792 (+0.68%) after 17 days; need to convert these unrealized gains. Will reassess HFCL pending order at next tick."
}
